action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 2 fixed the inspect.py shadowing bug and confirmed speechbrain imports correctly. No training or evaluation has been run yet. We have a pretrained MetricGAN+ checkpoint available offline that is state-of-the-art on VoiceBank+DEMAND. Analysis: To maximize PESQ, the fastest path to a strong baseline is to use this pretrained model. However, phase-2 evaluation requires models to load from the workspace, so we must copy the checkpoint into the workspace first. We also need to verify that our inference pipeline (model loading, enhancement, saving) works on local validation data and produces a sensible PESQ before burning an eval iteration. Decision: 1) Copy /opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank into workspace as pretrained_metricgan. 2) Run a validation script that performs inference on val_noisy and scores against val_clean using the same core logic as predict.py. 3) Submit eval with the pretrained checkpoint to get the official baseline score and measure eval latency.
action.command: rm -rf pretrained_metricgan && cp -r /opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank pretrained_metricgan && python validate_pretrained.py
